summary: Backend-only testing for 4 corrections in CRM AlphaAgency. All 14 tests PASSED: 1) Partial payment system (acompte/solde) with 'partiel' status works correctly, 2) CA Encaissé calculation based on sum of total_paid is correct, 3) PDF contains 'Paiements reçus' section with payment details, 4) ThingsPage.jsx auto-reschedule code for past tasks is present.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/invoices/{id}/payments correctly handles payment_type='acompte' with acompte_percent parameter
Invoice status correctly transitions: brouillon → partiel (after acompte) → payée (after solde)
CA Encaissé in dashboard stats uses $sum of total_paid field with facture_filter (FAC- prefix OR document_type=facture)
PDF generation (lines 596-652) includes 'Paiements reçus' section when payments exist and total_paid > 0
ThingsPage.jsx (lines 34-48) contains auto-reschedule logic for past incomplete tasks

success_rate.frontend: N/A (backend-only testing, code review for ThingsPage)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted 1 test invoice (FAC-2026-XXXX) with acompte (30%) and solde payments during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 corrections verified: 1) Partial payments with acompte/solde types work, status transitions correctly to 'partiel' then 'payée', 2) Dashboard CA Encaissé = sum of total_paid from FAC- invoices, 3) PDF shows 'Paiements reçus' section with payment details, 4) ThingsPage auto-reschedules past incomplete tasks to today.

verified_features.partial_payment_acompte: PASS - POST /api/invoices/{id}/payments with payment_type='acompte' and acompte_percent=30 works
verified_features.partial_payment_status_partiel: PASS - Invoice status changes to 'partiel' after acompte payment
verified_features.partial_payment_status_payee: PASS - Invoice status changes to 'payée' after solde payment
verified_features.ca_encaisse_calculation: PASS - total_paid matches sum of payments from FAC- invoices
verified_features.pdf_payments_section: PASS - PDF contains 'Paiements reçus' section when payments exist
verified_features.things_page_auto_reschedule: PASS - Code review confirms auto-reschedule logic for past tasks

features: Updates status to 'partiel' for partial payments
Updates status to 'payée' when fully paid
Uses facture_filter with $or for FAC- prefix OR document_type=facture
Shows 'Paiements reçus' section when payments exist
Shows payment date in French format (DD/MM/YYYY)
Checks if task is not completed and not archived
Tracks original date in rescheduledFrom field
